hero.headline: Chicago's Personal Injury Lawyer — On Your Side
hero.subheadline: Serving Illinois families for over [X] years. No fee unless we win.
hero.note: PLACEHOLDER — needs Conrad's review before launch

services.title: How We Can Help
services.subtitle: We handle all types of personal injury cases across Illinois

practice.car_desc: Injured in a collision? We handle all insurance negotiations and fight for maximum compensation.
practice.medical_desc: When healthcare providers fail their patients, we hold them accountable and pursue justice.
practice.workplace_desc: Hurt on the job? You have rights. We navigate workers comp and third-party claims.
practice.slip_desc: Property owners have a duty of care. When they fail, we make sure you are made whole.
practice.wrongful_desc: We stand with families who have lost loved ones due to negligence, fighting for the justice they deserve.
practice.product_desc: Defective products cause serious harm. We hold manufacturers and distributors responsible.

cta.ready_desc: Your first consultation is completely free. No obligation, no pressure — just answers.

footer.tagline: Personal injury law for the people of Illinois. No fee unless we win your case.
footer.disclaimer: This website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. No attorney-client relationship is formed by visiting this site or submitting a contact form. Past results do not guarantee future outcomes. Conrad Szewczyk is licensed to practice law in the State of Illinois.
